text: Allows to calculate the parameters of beer from refractometer measurements - Brix. Has 2 modes:

items: **Brix.** If you know original and final gravity in Brix scale you can calculate this values in Plato or hydrometer scale, as well as alcohol by volume value (ABV).
**Final measurements.** Use this mode in case of you have the final values in Brix and hydrometer scales and want to calculate original gravity and ABV value.

text: This factor can be different for different breweries. How to calculate it:

items: Measure the specific gravity with refractometer.
Measure the specific gravity with hydrometer.
Convert hydrometer value to Brix using the equation **Brix=(SG-1)/0.004,** where SG - specific gravity measured by hydrometer.
Divide refractometer value (1) by actual hydrometer value (3). Now you have a number between 1.02 and 1.06.

Repeat this calculations several times and calculate the average value. You can use this number as a correction factor for your brewery. The factor is about 1.04 in general and we use this value by default.
